name: opportunities.r2.purge
description: Daily at 04:00 UTC: physical R2 teardown of canonicals stuck in status='deleted' past the 7-day grace window. Drops raw_refs rows, GCs orphaned raw/{hash}.html.gz blobs whose ref count hit zero, deletes cluster bundles, stamps r2_purged_at for idempotency. DISABLED — target handler queries canonical_jobs which is dropped in Phase 6; will be re-enabled in v1.1 once the Parquet-backed retention compactor is implemented.
